name: String Beans & Coconut Koora
recipeIngredient: 3 Whole red chile peppers (broken up by hand into pieces)
recipeInstructions:
1. Cut beans crosswise into 1/4 inch pieces.
2. Boil with salt and turmeric until tender, about 10 minutes.
3. Drain and set aside.
4. Heat oil in a small saucepan or skillet. When oil is hot, lower heat and add chana dal, urad dal, mustard seeds, cumin, chili peppers, and curry leaves (if using). Stir, cooking until dal turns golden and mustard seeds pop.
5. Remove from heat, add coconut, stir for a minute, and mix into green beans.
6. Serve warm.
